calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Grivel Mora, Site Director for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Oscar Calderon.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, and against defendant Oscar Calderon as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $234.00.
Holdover Damages - $167.70.
Costs - $335.00.
Total - $736.70.

Additionally, plaintiff Caritas management Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 705 Natoma Street, #427, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar
